page.title: add asset
page.description: register a new IoT asset with predefined template

stepper.title: progress steps
stepper.subtitle: complete all steps to create a new asset
stepper.requiredInfo: all fields marked with * are required

step1.label: identification
step1.title: identification
step1.subtitle: add basic information about the asset

description.label: description
description.placeholder: enter a description for this asset

step2.label: asset template
step2.title: asset template
step2.subtitle: select the template that defines hardware specifications and payload handling

assetTemplateId.label: asset template
assetTemplateId.hint: template that defines manufacturer, model and handler

banner.title: what is asset template?
banner.description: asset templates define hardware specifications (manufacturer, model, version) and the payload handler that will be used to process data from this asset.

step3.label: route groups
step3.title: route groups
step3.subtitle: select one or more route groups to define how asset data will be routed

banner.title: what are route groups?
banner.description: route groups define how telemetry data from this asset will be routed to different destinations like business rules, lakehouses, or notification channels.

step4.label: connectivity
step4.title: connectivity
step4.subtitle: configure communication protocol and asset location

certificate.revokedEmpty: No revoked certificates for this asset.

protocol.label: protocol
protocol.hint: select the communication protocol for this asset

mqttUsername.label: username
mqttUsername.hintDerived: asset UUID — program the device with this exact value
mqttUsername.minLength: username must be at least 3 characters

mqttPassword.label: password
mqttPassword.placeholderEdit: leave blank to keep the current password
mqttPassword.hint: the device password is bcrypt-hashed server-side and validated by the broker on every CONNECT
mqttPassword.hintEdit: leave blank to keep the existing password. Type a new value to rotate it.
mqttPassword.minLength: password must be at least 8 characters

authType.label: authentication mode
authType.hint: the broker enforces this mode at CONNECT — switching modes revokes the unused credential
authType.certBannerTitle: the certificate is generated after the asset is saved
authType.certBannerBody: as soon as you click 'Save', a download dialog opens with cert + private key as a zip. The key is shown ONCE and never stored — keep the file safe. If lost, revoke and re-issue from the asset details drawer.

value.label: validity
value.hint: how long each issued certificate stays valid

unit.label: unit
unit.hint: time unit applied to the validity value

mqttClientId.label: client ID
mqttClientId.hintDerived: managed by the platform — derived from the asset UUID
mqttClientId.minLength: client ID must be at least 3 characters

debugEnabled.label: debug mode
debugEnabled.hint: when enabled, telemetry events will be logged for debugging purposes

banner.info: select the communication protocol for your device. HTTP and MQTT are available.
banner.httpInfo: for HTTP devices, create a Data Source to receive data from this asset.
banner.mqttInfo: configure MQTT credentials for secure device connection to the broker.

certDialog.title: generate MQTT certificate
certDialog.warning: the private key is shown only once. Download the zip and store it securely — the platform never persists it. If you lose it, you will need to revoke this certificate and issue a new one.
certDialog.replaceWarning: this asset already has an active certificate. Generating a new one revokes the existing certificate immediately.

step5.label: health monitoring
step5.title: health monitoring
step5.subtitle: enable monitoring to detect when the asset goes offline

step6.label: review
step6.title: review
step6.subtitle: review all configuration before creating the asset
step6.successMessage: ready to save! click 'Save' to confirm your changes.

notifications.validationFailed: validation error. check the data and try again.
notifications.networkError: network error. check your connection and try again.
notifications.alreadyExists: an asset with this name already exists.
notifications.fillRequiredFields: please fill in all required fields
notifications.certIssueFailed: failed to issue certificate. Please try again from the assets list.
notifications.assetCreatedWithoutCert: asset created without a certificate. Generate one from the assets list when ready.
